objective: Allow bounded QSOs to discover and consume QSO-SEEKER evidence through the Digital Consciousness Field without direct network or raw-payload access.
invariants: QSOs never receive raw network responses.
Every query is bound to QSO identity, experiment, purpose, topic, sensitivity, and retention scope.
Field capabilities are explicit, revocable, non-transferable, and auditable.
Evidence remains untrusted data and is never executed.
Every consumed record carries source-to-field provenance and a content hash.
Human review is required before conclusions become actions.
